settings_subheader: Manage everything about your productivity experience here.
profile_info_desc: Update your name, email, and profile photo.
settings_modules_desc: Enable or disable features you want to use.
security_desc: Ensure your account stays secure with a strong password.
security_danger_desc: Permanently delete your account. Data cannot be recovered.
security_confirm_delete_desc: Enter your password to confirm that you really want to delete your Oneformind account.
password_security_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
delete_account_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please download any data you wish to retain.
delete_account_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete_account_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. Please enter your password to confirm.
billing_desc: Manage your subscription plan and premium features.
billing_premium_desc: Your account is currently active as a Premium member. Enjoy unlimited access to all productivity features.
billing_plan_desc: Upgrade to a new level of productivity with exclusive features.
legal_desc: Important pages regarding your data and privacy on Oneformind.
legal_section_1_desc: We collect data that you provide directly when registering, including name, email, and content you create within the Oneformind application such as habits, journals, and daily tasks.
legal_section_2_desc: Your privacy is our priority. Your data is stored with industry-standard encryption. We will never sell your personal data to any third party.
legal_section_3_desc: Payment transactions are processed through a secure third-party gateway (Midtrans). We do not store credit card information or other sensitive payment details on our servers.
photo_adjust_instruction: Select a photo, then you can adjust the image position before uploading.
